About

Where elite athletic discipline meets sharp analytical thinking.

I'm a dual-degree candidate at Brown University pursuing Business Economics and International & Public Affairs, maintaining a perfect 4.0 GPA while competing as a Division I varsity rower.

As a 9× Italian National Champion and 2024 World & European Gold Medalist, I bring the same relentless drive to financial analysis, accounting, and problem-solving. Originally from Como, Italy — now based in Providence, RI.

Professional Experience
June 2025

Accounting Intern

Peterci Store · Como, Italy

Assisted in daily bookkeeping, invoice processing, and financial record maintenance. Organized and digitized financial data using Excel and Google Sheets to improve reporting accuracy. Supported month-end reconciliation and retail accounting workflows.

June 2024

Administrative & Accounting Intern

Canottieri Lario Rowing Club · Como, Italy

Contributed to quarterly financial statement preparation and assisted in budget tracking and variance analysis. Collaborated with the admin team to streamline financial documentation for a sports institution with 200+ members.

Apr 2023 — Present

Private Babysitter

Self-Employed · Como, Italy

Managed scheduling, budgeting for activities, and long-term planning for multiple families. Demonstrated reliability and strong interpersonal skills while balancing academic and athletic commitments.

May 2022 — Apr 2023

Catering Assistant

Anna Cooking Class · Como, Italy

Assisted in event logistics, inventory tracking, and customer service in fast-paced settings. Strengthened ability to perform under pressure while maintaining attention to detail.
